title: Etheria
description: Adds new magic system and dungeons
body:
**Etheria** is a mod that introduces a magic system based on ether to Minecraft, featuring a variety of unique mechanics. Rituals, artifacts, spells, and runes open up new possibilities for exploration and interaction with the world. Create ritual circles, enhance weapons and magic with artifacts, explore ancient ruins of the Seers, and uncover the secrets of the elements.

For player convenience, the mod includes an in-game guidebook that provides detailed explanations of all its features. 

**Etheria offers:**
- A magic system based on ether
- A deep artifact system with unique properties and upgrade potential
- Rituals for item creation
- Spells tied to the chosen element
- Dungeons with rare resources and secrets.
  
### Join the Etheria Minecraft mod community:
### Discord: [LINK](https://discord.gg/nEYDeEEHXF)

The Etheria mod does not require any dependencies.

The mod is currently in beta, so some bugs or issues may be present.
